name: python3-usb
title: python3-usb
description:
USB interface for Python (Python3)
For interacting with USB devices directly from Python, this
library may come in handy.
.
This version of python-usb is written entirely in Python and uses
ctypes to interact with various USB libraries
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of pyusb.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-usb because USB interface for Python (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-usb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-usb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-usb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
